[[Commander/Legends|Commander]] '''Brillstow''' was an officer aboard [[Reprisal (Imperial II-class)|''Reprisal'']] in [[0 ABY/Legends|0.5 ABY]]. When the [[Hand of Judgment]] fled from the [[Imperial Security Bureau/Legends|Imperial Security Bureau]], [[Daric LaRone]] contacted him. LaRone simulated [[Drelfin]]'s voice so that Brillstow believed he was an ISB officer. Knowing that insubordination would bring him into big trouble, he marked LaRone's words and brought the ''Reprisal'' out of the [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

{{Char-stub}}
